top_signals.title: South Korea raises rates to battle inflation pressure from Iran war
top_signals.summary: Central bank’s first move under Shin Hyun-song comes amid concern over won weakness and reliance on energy imports
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Big Tech rally drowns out Iran war fears — Buffett urges caution
top_signals.summary: Stocks closed higher on Big Tech gains and a surprise drop in wholesale prices, shrugging off fresh U.S. strikes on Iran, a naval blockade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Petroleum markets responded to disruptions in the Middle East in the second quarter
top_signals.summary: Petroleum markets in the second quarter of 2026 (2Q26) were characterized by continued disruptions to international crude oil and petroleum product flows through the Strait of Hormuz, contributing to higher and more volatile crude oil prices through most of the quarter. The disruptions also resulted in international buyers seeking alternative supply sources for petroleum products, driving up U.S. refinery margins, production, and exports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Updating the Bank of England’s fee regime for recognised payment systems
top_signals.summary: The government is consulting on the fee regime for recognised payment systems, specified service providers and digital settlement asset service providers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: China Evergrande liquidators warn PwC partners not to use divorce to shield assets  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Federal Open Market Committee, June 16-17, 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bowman, Responsible Innovation and Financial Inclusion
top_signals.summary: Speech At “Next-Gen Financial Inclusion,” the third annual Financial Inclusion Conference hosted by the Federal Reserve Board, Washington, D.C. (via pre-recorded video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chinese drugmakers with big ambitions struggle to recruit staff for global expansion
top_signals.summary: China's rapid rise as a hub for testing experimental, next-generation medicines is outpacing the industry's ability to build the workforce needed to take those products global.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Global liquefied natural gas trade volumes reached record high in 2025
top_signals.summary: Global liquefied natural gas (LNG) trade volumes increased 5.4% to a record 56.3 billion cubic feet per day last year (Bcf/d), driven largely by U.S. LNG export capacity expanding to meet growing demand, according to a recent report from the International Group of Liquefied Natural Gas Importers (GIIGNL). Global LNG trade has slowed this year following the closure of the key export route for Qatar, the world's second-largest LNG exporter.
